{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of the Wasteland
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of the Wasteland]] has aspects of earth and wind, with techniques taking the form of blowing golden sand.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
